## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Shaped and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and feedback on recent articles.](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Adjust content strategy: Mix of SEO-focused pieces and more targeted, middle-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Improve article structure: Enhance readability, focus topics, and align with Shaped's value props](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Publishing process: Set up GrowthX team with CMS access, plan 30-min training session](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [New workflow: David to send 5 SEO + 2 mid-funnel outlines each Friday for approval](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Blend SEO-optimized articles with more focused, middle-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Experiment with different approaches to find optimal traffic/relevance balance](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Continue producing longer, keyword-rich pieces for SEO, but also create shorter, targeted articles](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Aim for \~7-minute read time for most articles; longer pieces acceptable for "ultimate guides"](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

### Article Feedback and Improvements

  - [Add Shaped segue/CTA to article conclusions](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
  - [Ensure content aligns with Shaped's core value propositions (e.g., real-time capabilities)](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Improve article structure: strong, engaging intros; avoid concept overload in latter half](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [For technical topics (e.g., vector search), clearly separate concepts to avoid conflation](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

### Publishing Process

  - GrowthX team to gain Webflow CMS access (<team@growthx.ai>)
  - [Nic to conduct 30-minute training on Shaped's custom CMS setup](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Initial articles to be submitted as drafts for approval before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Goal: Start publishing soon to gather data on performance](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)

### New Content Planning Workflow

  - [David to send 7 outlines weekly (5 SEO, 2 mid-funnel) by Friday COB](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Shaped team to review, approve, or suggest changes](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [Allows for collaborative planning and alignment on content direction](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)

### SEO vs. Audience-Specific Content Balance

  - [Continue SEO focus (using tools like Surfer SEO) for traffic generation](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Incorporate more targeted pieces (e.g., Teemo-style articles) for engagement](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Explore product-specific content (e.g., Spotify, Netflix recommendation systems)](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

## Next Steps

  - GrowthX to set up Webflow CMS access (<team@growthx.ai>)
  - [Nic to schedule 30-minute CMS training session](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [David to send 7 content outlines (5 SEO, 2 mid-funnel) by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Shaped to review and approve outlines for next week's content](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [Begin publishing approved articles, monitoring performance to inform future strategy](https://fathom.video/share/QwJYAyBbrqkuLAxVUSMyGZnhZyBZai9y?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
